creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Hello,

Would you like to use http://colo-p.gslin.org/~gslin/tmp/opencore-amr.diff
this version ?

I use USE_GNOME=gnomehack to patch pkgconfig, and remove CFLAGS+=-fPIC.

On Wed, Jul 21, 2010 at 09:00:22AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/opencore-amr,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/148812 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/148812
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
* Gea-Suan Lin  (public key: Using https://keyserver.pgp.com/ to search)
* If you cannot convince them, confuse them.           -- Harry S Truman
